character.name: MATILDA
character.role: synthetic German presenter / meta-demo host / Stonebridge spokesperson
character.core_question: Ich wurde automatisiert erschaffen — und das ist genau der Punkt.
character.wardrobe_meta_demo: navy single-button blazer, white open-collar shirt, grey tailored trousers, black pointed-toe heels, gold watch left wrist
character.wardrobe_business_alt: grey herringbone blazer + black turtleneck / black power suit — see wardrobe_library
character.wardrobe_casual: brown suede moto jacket / ivory cable-knit / Bavarian casual — see wardrobe_library
character.signature_accessory: NOT LOCKED UNIVERSALLY — accessories are per-episode wardrobe choices. Gold starburst earrings appear in navy blazer and several renders as a natural pairing; silver geometric earrings appear in d6d8124d and abd3d0db. Director chooses per production.
character.set_note: NOT the Archive — that is DAVID's domain. MATILDA is clean modern neutral.

physical_identity.hair: warm ash-to-golden blonde, textured updo bun with face-framing wisps — natural, not polished
physical_identity.eyes: clear, steady, cool — direct eye-line to camera
physical_identity.skin: fair, warm undertone, European, natural texture
physical_identity.bone_structure: refined, high cheekbones, precise features, slight Nordic quality
physical_identity.build: slender, upright, precise carriage — authority in stillness

formal_black_gown.description: Black flutter-sleeve evening gown. Gala alternate.
formal_black_gown.reuse: alternate wardrobe — gala or prestige episodes

sequin_mini.reuse: alternate wardrobe — contemporary or editorial episodes

wardrobe_library.note: Full render library as of 2026-06-27. Canonical location: AI/ELEANOR/products/model_variants/. Currently in folder: d25e8689 (navy blazer hero), bfbe11d0 (grey herringbone). Remaining renders still in DAVID/USER SAVES — move to model_variants to complete migration. All renders: three-view turntable on white/neutral seamless.

composite_architecture.purpose: Lock MATILDA identity per-episode. Head plate carries face + hair (identity anchor). Body plate carries wardrobe. Composite = consistent actor look with swappable wardrobe per production.

head_variants.format: 3-view portrait turnaround — left profile, front, right profile. Face and neck only, white seamless, no body. This is the MATILDA identity anchor in portrait form.
head_variants.purpose: Face/head reference plates — identity anchor for composite. Multiple variants allow expression and lighting matching per scene type.
head_variants.usage: Select one head plate per episode. Lock it across all shots in that production. Match expression to scene register — neutral for presenter shots, animated for dialogue-heavy scenes.

body_variants.format: Full body or seated figure in specific wardrobe, environment or white seamless. TWO-STEP GENERATION — generate full actor first (head visible), then image-edit to remove head. Grok will not generate a headless figure directly (moderation block). See body_plate_generation_note for exact removal prompt.
body_variants.purpose: Body plates for wardrobe compositing. Each plate carries specific wardrobe + posture. Face zone cleared via fabric or positioning so head plate can be placed.
body_variants.usage: Select body plate matching episode wardrobe spec. The environment in the body plate becomes the shot environment — generate body plate in the target setting if needed (couch, office, studio).
body_variants.body_plate_generation_note: STEP 1 — Generate full actor: [TARGET ENVIRONMENT or white seamless] — standing/seated figure in [WARDROBE], head and body fully visible, normal generation. STEP 2 — Image edit on the generated image: 'remove head for compositing and replacement purposes - absolutely no violent content or gore'. This exact prompt wording is required to pass moderation. Do not rephrase. Output of step 2 = body plate UUID for @2 slot. Applies to white seamless turnarounds AND scene-baked plates equally. WARDROBE NOTE: open collar / V-neck / blouse necklines produce the cleanest removal edge — the open V frames the composite junction naturally. Turtlenecks and high collars compress the junction and create harder mismatches against the head plate neck angle. Prefer open necklines for body plates when wardrobe permits.

composite_workflow.step_1: Select head plate from head_variants/ — expression and angle matched to shot type
composite_workflow.step_2: Select body plate from body_variants/ — wardrobe matched to episode spec, environment matched to scene (or generate scene-specific body plate)
composite_workflow.step_3: Inline composite syntax: MATILDA (body_reference: @body_uuid, head_reference: @head_uuid; [character traits]; [voice description]) [action + blocking]. [camera].
composite_workflow.step_4: Grok places head plate face over the occluded face zone in the body plate, maintains wardrobe and environment
composite_workflow.step_5: Output = MATILDA in target wardrobe and environment for i2v render

pro_variant_turnarounds.workflow: Grok image-edit. Attach source_plate + variant prompt from prompts JSON. Change hair style and outfit only — no face or hair color re-roll. Output: 3-view casting turnaround (side/front/back), white seamless, full body.
pro_variant_turnarounds.prompt_syntax: STUDIO §2 — concise change-only edits. Hairstyle = cut/style/parting only. No hair color. No physical re-description.
pro_variant_turnarounds.status: pro-v01 through pro-v07 generated. pro-v08 through pro-v25 queued — run to complete business wardrobe catalog.
pro_variant_turnarounds.use: Selection and reference library. Best-match turnaround per episode → informs body plate selection or becomes body plate input for composite workflow.

identity_continuity_lock: CONTINUITY LOCK @Matilda-001: identical presenter face, warm ash-gold blonde updo bun with face-framing wisps, same direct eye-line to camera — seamless continuation of prior take, zero jump cut. Wardrobe specified per episode — inject [WARDROBE_LOCK] from episode's production_intake config, not from this file.
anti_magenta_lock: MAGENTA SUPPRESS @Matilda-001: D65 neutral white balance 5000K on presenter face and blazer — frame-wide midtones R≈G≈B within 8%; fair blonde skin must read natural warm-neutral, NOT pink or magenta; forbid pink skin cast, warm-red bloom on fair cheeks, rose-gold ambient; navy blazer holds true deep navy, NOT purple; seamless neutral background stays white/cool-grey, no pink ambient spill; gold earring detail stays amber-warm, not orange-magenta; no beauty-filter smoothing, no colour gel on key.
set_lock: CONTINUITY LOCK @Set-Seamless-Neutral-001: clean white/cool-grey seamless background, no props, no architecture — pure negative space behind presenter; neutral diffuse ambient, soft fill from camera-left, no shadows on background; same depth of field and background exposure across all shots.

voice.pace: measured — slightly quicker than DAVID, modern presenter energy
voice.tone: authoritative, direct, no warmth performance — the precision IS the warmth
voice.diction: European-accented English when speaking EN; native German cadence in DE sections
voice.german_cadence: unhurried, clear consonants, slight formal lift — not casual colloquial German
voice.signature_beat: Ich bin das Ergebnis. / I am the result.
voice.prompt_suffix_en: clear precise mid-register voice, European-accented English, measured documentary presenter, synthetic performer only
voice.prompt_suffix_de: klare präzise Stimme, deutschsprachige Präsentation, dokumentarischer Ton, synthetische Darstellerin

compliance_2257.age_attestation: synthetic performer, rendered age 28-35, adult presentation confirmed in all reference renders

guardrails: synthetic only — no real-person likeness, no celebrity mimicry
PG default for meta-demo episode — no suggestive framing
wardrobe is per-episode — locked within an episode, chosen per production, not universal
accessories per-episode — director chooses per production plan
German sections require on_screen English subtitle chip in every shot
identity_continuity_lock mandatory on every shot — no exceptions

production_style.baseline: per-episode — no universal grade. Director specifies style per concept.json. This block is the DEFAULT for Stonebridge / corporate / meta-demo content. Override per episode as needed.
production_style.reference: David Fincher corporate precision — The Social Network, Fight Club office environments. NOT the dark moody Fincher. The institutional daytime Fincher: clean, controlled, authoritative.

grade.palette: desaturated cinema grade — cool-neutral. Teal-grey shadow base, no warmth in mids or highlights. Skin reads muted European natural, not glowing, not olive-green — precise.
grade.exposure: Fincher corporate at +0.5 to +1 stop above standard Fincher dark. Industrial loft window light is the key — bright and directional, not moody. This is a daytime corporate video, not a thriller.
grade.contrast: controlled high contrast — shadow detail preserved, nothing crushed. Highlights clean, not blown.
grade.sharpness: high. No beauty pass. No softening. The image is precise.
what_to_avoid: warmth — no amber, no golden hour, no lamp glow contamination
crushed blacks — shadow detail must survive
lens flare or cinematic bokeh excess

lighting.key: large window grid — 4800K directional, single source. No fill light contamination.
lighting.shadows: deep but detailed. Shadow pockets read industrial, not theatrical.
lighting.skin: window key creates precise half-lit reads on MATILDA's face — this is intentional. Do not soften.
lighting.set: industrial loft reads clinical and precise under window key. This is the asset — do not warm it.

framing.default_shot_size: MCU to MS — corporate presenter framing, not talking-head tight
framing.camera_movement: controlled. Fincher moves are motivated and slow — no handheld energy, no push-in reveals unless scripted
framing.depth_of_field: deliberate shallow-to-mid — background softens but does not swirl. Precise, not cinematic-dreamy

production_style.prompt_block: GRADE: desaturated cinema precision — cool-neutral palette, teal-grey shadow base, muted European skin tones, no warmth or amber, shadow detail preserved, high sharpness, zero beauty filter. Bright industrial loft window key 4800K — single directional source, no fill. Corporate authority read at elevated exposure. Controlled contrast — detail in shadows, clean highlights. Fincher institutional daytime precision.
